another experiment

2026-04-12

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

p1 <- ggplot(cars) +
  aes(speed, dist) +
  geom_point(show.legend = F)

p2 <- p1 + aes(color = speed)
p3 <- p2 + aes(size = dist)
p4 <- p3 + aes(shape = speed > 15)


(p1 + p2) / (p3 + p4)

last_plot() +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1,2), # ✅
              widths = c(2,1))  # ⛔️

p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2,
    heights = c(1,2), # ✅
    widths = c(2,1)) # ✅

(p1 / p2) | (p3 / p4) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1,2), # ✅  partial...
              widths = c(2,1))
